label: War & Conflict
description: Battles, wars, invasions, revolutions, and the political violence that reshaped states.

label: Politics & Empires
description: The rise and fall of states — coronations, treaties, constitutional moments, and imperial administration.

label: Science & Technology
description: Discoveries, inventions, and the slow accumulation of human understanding of the natural world.

label: Art & Culture
description: Literature, music, architecture, philosophy, and the movements that changed how people saw the world.

label: Exploration
description: Voyages, expeditions, and encounters between previously separate worlds.

label: Religion & Ideas
description: Foundings and reforms of religions, philosophies, and ideologies with lasting global reach.

label: Disaster & Disease
description: Pandemics, famines, earthquakes, and other events whose scale rewrote the demographic map.

label: Economy & Trade
description: Long-distance trade, currencies, financial revolutions, and the material basis of history.
